name: LlamaGPT
description: Self-hosted, offline ChatGPT-like chatbot powered by Llama 2
compose:
name: slashnode-llama-gpt
services:
  llama-gpt-api:
    image: ghcr.io/getumbrel/llama-gpt-api:1.0.1
    container_name: llama-gpt-llama-gpt-api
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks:
      - slashnode
    environment:
      MODEL: /models/llama-2-7b-chat.bin
    ports:
      - 127.0.0.1:1234:3000
  llama-gpt-ui:
    image: ghcr.io/getumbrel/llama-gpt-ui:1.0.1
    container_name: llama-gpt-llama-gpt-ui
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks:
      - slashnode
    environment:
      OPENAI_API_KEY: sk-XXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXX
      OPENAI_API_HOST: http://llama-gpt-api:8000
      DEFAULT_MODEL: /models/llama-2-7b-chat.bin
      WAIT_HOSTS: llama-gpt-api:8000
      WAIT_TIMEOUT: '600'
networks:
  slashnode:
    external: true
